query:
UPDATE files
                SET parent_id_path = $1 || parent_id_path[array_length($2::bytea[], 1) + 1:],
                    parent_name_path = $3 || parent_name_path[array_length($2::text[], 1) + 1:]
                WHERE owner_id = $4 AND parent_id_path >= $2 AND parent_id_path < $2 || NULL
